title: spawn_relay() doc: explain why TempDir is returned
description: In cli/tests/e2e_payment.rs, spawn_relay() returns (String, TempDir) but its doc comment only says 'Returns the WebSocket URL'. It does not explain that TempDir is returned so the caller keeps the temp directory alive — if the caller drops it immediately, the relay database is deleted mid-test. The doc should add a sentence: 'The TempDir must be kept alive by the caller for the duration of the test; dropping it deletes the relay database.'
